'''''Meniscus''''' was the personal [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Martio Batch]]. The executive officer of the ''Meniscus'' betrayed and executed Batch following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and joined [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Blitzer Harrsk]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]] originally named the ''Meniscus'' in a segment of his Grand Admirals article that was cut, and is therefore unofficial. All other information on it is official.

A [[Wikipedia:meniscus|meniscus]] is a type of lens; the ship was given the name due to Batch's involvement with cloaking research.
